column10: Yeshivah Gedolah for chasiddishe bochurim who would not fit in a mainstream Yeshivah. For boys who want to grow and improve. Maintains 3 regular sedorim covering Gemora, Halocha and Chassidus with a strong focus on instilling masikus hatorah in every bochur.

Hotline where ordinary women find the strength to overcome technology challenges. Personal stories, 5-minute daily motivational sound bites, musical inspiration and direct technology shailah helpline.

Panim Meiros offers classes that provide open forum discussions with Rabbonim on all aspects of Yiddishkeit, the staff offers support, therapy and guidence along the journey. Coupled with courses, extracurricular, trips & Shabbos activities producung the happiest, highest calibre girls.

Internationally acclaimed expert and former stutterer is the founder and director. He gives over a practical method, unprecedented methodical integration program, extracurricular skills group for public speaking and more, and brilliant follow up system with graduates of the program. 
Trained in: Manchester/London: Benny Rakow BSc(Hons), Fda, MBACP; Lakewood: Tzipporah Silberberg M.S, CCC-SLP; Monsey: Aaron Muller M.S, CCC-SLP, TSSLD; Boro Park and Williamsburg: Tzvi Friedman M.S, CC-SLP, TSSLD.
